statusLine.command: input=$(cat); workspace_dir=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); remaining=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.remaining_percentage // empty'); printf "\033[48;5;68m\033[38;5;255m %s \033[0m" "$(basename "$workspace_dir")"; if git -C "$workspace_dir" rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then branch=$(git -C "$workspace_dir" -c core.useBuiltinFSMonitor=false -c core.fsmonitor=false branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$branch" ]; then printf "\033[48;5;60m\033[38;5;68m\033[0m"; printf "\033[48;5;60m\033[38;5;68m  %s " "$branch"; if [ -n "$(git -C "$workspace_dir" -c core.useBuiltinFSMonitor=false -c core.fsmonitor=false status --porcelain 2>/dev/null)" ]; then printf "\033[38;5;68m● \033[0m"; else printf "\033[0m"; fi; fi; fi; printf "\033[48;5;235m\033[38;5;60m\033[0m"; printf "\033[48;5;235m\033[38;5;68m %s \033[0m" "$model"; if [ -n "$remaining" ]; then printf "\033[48;5;234m\033[38;5;235m\033[0m"; printf "\033[48;5;234m\033[38;5;110m  %.0f%% \033[0m" "$remaining"; fi; printf "\033[38;5;234m\033[0m"; printf "\n"
